arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: FC Barcelona, Liverpool, and Manchester City looking closely at Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich; That time Eintracht Frankfurt almost landed Michael Olise; Arsenal eyeing Dušan Vlahović; and MORE!
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is ready to consider committing his future to the Bundesliga giants amidst interest from Barcelona, Liverpool and Manchester City. A look at the rosters and injuries for Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Injury Update: Manuel Neuer fit to play for Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The first-year Bayern head coach has his side off to a perfect start thus far, having won all six matches across all competitions, but now the Bavarians are set to play host to reigning Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen at the Allianz Arena. Despite being expected to play against Werder Bremen last weekend in Bayern’s 5-0 win over Die Grün-Weißen, Ulreich starting for Neuer was a late switch from Kompany as a precaution as to not further aggravate Neuer’s existing problem.

arts.ttl: Report: Borussia Mönchengladbach sporting director Nils Schmadtke set to join Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Following on from recent reports that Bayern Munich is set to release chief scout Markus Pilawa, it seems that, according to Florian Plettenberg the club has found their replacement in Borussia Mönchengladbach’s Nils Schmadtke: Nils Schmadtke is on the verge to become the new overall chief scout of FC Bayern to replace Markus Pilawa.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich sensation Aleksandar Pavlović nabs ‘Newcomer of the Season’ Award
arts.sum: Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg explained on Twitter earlier this month that the 21-year-old Bayern youngster and Germany international had captured the lion’s share in a poll of listeners to his transfers show for last year’s ‘Newcomer of the Season’: The former Bayern Munich ball boy is now all grown up and promoted to the seniors — and winning awards for his excellent play.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer heir apparent Alexander Nübel’s Bayern Munich salary revealed
arts.sum: But despite occasional friction, Bayern and Nübel have found a way to make the arrangement work, including even a five-year contract extension this past spring after at one point seemingly wanting out of Munich. According to reporting from Sport Bild, the terms of the new deal aren’t half bad — for Bayern or for Nübel’s loan club, VfB Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich prepping for Bundesliga showdown with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has been through Bundesliga battles before, but the meeting with Bayer Leverkusen this weekend holds a little more weight than usual. Of course, in the end it’s about winning, but the way we’re winning games gives us confidence in our strengths.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich very keen on Man City target, player expected to cost €100m next summer
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are keen on bringing Bayer Leverkusen talent Florian Wirtz to the Allianz Arena next summer but the German giants will face strong competition from Man City and Real Madrid. The 21-year-old is one of Europe’s most exciting talents and has developed rapidly ever since making his debut for the Bundesliga champions in 2020. […] The post Bayern Munich very keen on Man City target, player expected to cost €100m next summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich wanted to bring back Dante in January?
arts.sum: Back in January when Eric Dier was signed, Bayern had briefly discussed bringing back Dante to the club for six months If you believe the report from Philipp Kessler, as captured by @iMiaSanMia, Bayern considered signing former defender Dante, treble winner with Bayern in 2013, before getting Dier:

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 11: More build-up for Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen; What we’ll learn about Bayern’s backline; Where Bayern stands with Florian Wirtz; Looking at the odd men out at Bayern; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has a massive game ahead with Bayer Leverkusen, but there is so much going on with this squad that we have plenty to discuss. Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen are ready to go!
